Randy Parker named CEO of Hyundai & Genesis Motor NA, leading both companies. Hyundai NA on track for fourth year of sales growth under Parker.
news.summary: Hyundai Motor Company has appointed Parker to lead North America for both Hyundai and Genesis. Parker will continue serving as the CEO of Hyundai Motor America. The company is progressing towards achieving a fourth consecutive year of retail sales growth under Parker's leadership. The announcement was made in Fountain Valley, California, on December 10, 2024.

Westlake Corp appoints Roger A. Cregg to board, replacing Marius A. Haas. Haas retired on Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Houston, Westlake Corporation (NYSE: WLK) revealed the appointment of Mr. Roger A. Cregg to its board of directors, succeeding Mr. Marius A. Haas. Haas had previously announced his retirement from the board, with the official retirement date set for December 10, 2024. Westlake Corporation Executive expressed their excitement about Cregg joining the board.

news.headline: Google and Tesla rise, while Palantir and Nvidia fall due to growth concerns. Dow Jones navigate these movements.
news.summary: In the realm of quantum computing, Google has advanced with its Willow quantum computing chip, while Tesla remains a strong competitor in the industry. However, this development has overshadowed a concerning trend of weakness in growth stocks. Dow Jones Futures reflect this mixed landscape, with Google and Tesla showing strength, while companies like Palantir and Nvidia are experiencing declines due to ongoing issues with growth. Investors are advised to tread carefully and consider their options amidst the current market conditions.

news.headline: Stocks decline as traders strategize for CPI | CPI data: 12/10/2024; Bloomberg: The Close
news.summary: In a recent report on the global economy, it was found that the GDP growth rate for the year is projected to be 3.2% higher than initially predicted. The unemployment rate has also fallen by 1.5%, reaching a record low of 4.2%. Additionally, inflation has decreased by 0.8% compared to the previous quarter. These positive trends indicate a strong economic recovery and a promising outlook for the future.

Amouage opens new SoHo boutique, 122 Prince Street, New York, marking its second global installment.
news.summary: Amouage, a prestigious Omani High Perfumery House known for crafting luxurious fragrances, has revealed its "SoHo Petite Boutique" in New York City at 122 Prince Street. This boutique, the second of its kind worldwide, showcases the brand's exquisite creations to discerning customers.

Keg Royalties Income Fund declares $0.0946 per unit distribution for Dec. 2024, payable to  shareholders on Dec. 31.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on December 10, 2024, the Keg Royalties Income Fund (TSX: KEG.UN) revealed a $0.0946 per unit distribution for December 2024. This distribution is set to be paid on December 31, 2024, to unitholders recorded as of December 21, 2024.

news.headline: Oasis increases stake in Kao Corp to over 5% and will nominate independent directors for AGM, aiming for sustainable growth.
news.summary: In Hong Kong, Oasis Management Company Ltd. has raised its stake in Japanese company Kao Corporation (4452 JT) to over 5%, solidifying its position as one of Kao's major institutional investors. This move emphasizes Oasis's dedication to fostering sustainable growth at Kao, a prominent player in Japan's Fast-Moving Consumer Goods sector.

news.headline: Myriad Genetics updates on talks with UnitedHealthcare for pharmacogenetic testing policy.
news.summary: Myriad Genetics has released an update on their discussions with UnitedHealthcare regarding the medical policy for pharmacogenetic testing. The company provides genetic testing services and has been in talks with UnitedHealthcare, one of the largest healthcare insurers in the country. Pharmacogenetic testing is a type of genetic testing that analyzes how an individual's genes may affect their response to certain medications. The outcome of these discussions may impact the coverage and availability of pharmacogenetic testing for UnitedHealthcare members. This update comes amidst the increasing interest in personalized medicine and genetic testing.

news.headline: Biden warns against reversing tax cuts and tariffs, predicts GOP opposition to undoing his policies.
news.summary: The former president warned that any attempt by his successor to reverse the Biden agenda would be met with opposition from the Republican Party.

news.headline: MARA Holdings acquires $1.1 BTC, achieves groundbreaking 50 EH/s hashrate. Shares drop by 4.4% post buying 11,800 Bitcoins.
news.summary: Following the announcement of acquiring almost 11,800 Bitcoin and increasing its hashrate to an industry record, MARA saw a 4.4% drop in its shares at the close of the day.

Viking Engineering Lab in Houston attains ISO 17025 accreditation – Global testing standard met.
news.summary: In Houston on December 10, 2024, Viking Engineering, a subsidiary of GATE Energy entirely owned by its employees, shared the achievement of ISO 17025 accreditation by Viking Laboratory Services. This accreditation signifies compliance with the international standard for testing and quality management.

news.headline: Global functional food ingredients market to grow by USD 53.14 billion (2023-2028) at a CAGR of 7.38% with AI impacting trends.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of artificial intelligence on the market, with the global functional food ingredients market projected to increase by approximately USD 53.14 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research from Technavio suggests a compound annual growth rate of nearly 7.38% during this period.

news.headline: Record-breaking deal brings Juan Soto to the Mets, with an impressive undisclosed sum.
Madison Metals plans $2.0M private placement without a broker.
news.summary: A new report has revealed that the annual revenue of a top technology company hit a record high of $100 billion in the last fiscal year. This marks a 20% increase from the previous year, solidifying the company's position as a key player in the industry. The report also highlighted a significant rise in profits, which reached $15 billion, showcasing the company's strong financial performance. Additionally, the number of employees grew by 15% to 200,000, reflecting the company's expansion and commitment to creating more job opportunities. This positive growth indicates a promising future for the technology company in the competitive market.

Tanger purchases The Promenade at Chenal, a 270,000 sq. ft. shopping center in Little Rock, AK. #TangerProud
news.summary: Tanger has recently purchased The Promenade at Chenal, located in Little Rock, AK. This new acquisition comprises a 270,000 square foot open-air lifestyle shopping center.

news.headline: ZT Corporate held its 27th Annual Gala in Houston on Dec 7, 2024, with 1,000 guests. It highlighted achievements and future plans.
news.summary: Houston was illuminated by the dazzling lights of Downtown on December 7, 2024, during ZT Corporate's Chairman's Gala at Hilton Americas. Over 1,000 distinguished guests witnessed the event, marking a celebration of the company's success and a glimpse into its ambitious plans for 2030. The gala showcased ZT Corporate's achievements and growth, setting the tone for an exciting future.

Fiji Airways introduces first nonstop flight from Dallas Fort Worth to Fiji, marking a milestone in travel.
news.summary: Hello! Connecting to Fiji has become more convenient with the introduction of a new direct flight service by Fiji Airways. The national carrier of Fiji has commenced its longest nonstop route today, linking Dallas Fort Worth in Texas to the scenic tropical destination of Fiji. This new service offers travelers in the Texas region a direct connection to Fiji, saving them from multiple layovers and long travel times. Dallas Fort Worth now joins the list of cities offering direct flights to Fiji, enhancing accessibility for tourists and boosting tourism opportunities between the two destinations. The inaugural flight marks the beginning of a new chapter in air travel between the two regions, providing a more seamless and efficient means of transportation.

news.headline: GM discontinues Cruise robotaxi project, shifting focus to autonomous vehicles for personal use. #GM #robotaxi #autonomousvehicles
news.summary: The corporation announced its shift towards concentrating on the creation of self-driving vehicles for individual consumers.

news.summary: The RT-G robot, created by Shenzhen's Logon Technology, combines futuristic design elements with practical and potentially dangerous uses.
